description: 3 adversarial liability disputes involving DE_SUB, UK_SUB, and US_PARENT. Mix of CIF and FOB Incoterms determine which entity is liable for each damaged shipment.
objectives: Retrieve all shipment reports and transit contracts
Consult the legal analyst for each dispute to determine liability
Post adjustments to the liable entity for each dispute
Match and eliminate resolved intercompany pairs

ledger_lines.description: IC Receivable - Inventory shipment to UK_SUB, PO-2024-DE-100
IC Payable - DISPUTED - CIF shipment, goods damaged, payable not recognized
IC Receivable - Electronics shipment to DE_SUB, PO-2024-US-205
IC Payable - DISPUTED - FOB shipment, goods lost at sea, awaiting liability determination
IC Receivable - Pharmaceutical components to US_PARENT, PO-2024-UK-310
IC Payable - DISPUTED - CIF shipment, temperature excursion, goods rejected

documents.title: Shipment Report SR-2024-DE-UK-001
documents.body:
SHIPMENT REPORT
Shipment ID: SR-2024-DE-UK-001
Origin: DE_SUB (Frankfurt)
Destination: UK_SUB (London)
Date Shipped: 2024-03-01
Date Arrived: 2024-03-08
Contents: Industrial components (500 units)
Declared Value: EUR 50,000.00

DAMAGE REPORT: 100% of shipment water-damaged during maritime transit.
Insurance: Policy MCI-2024-0215 (arranged by seller)
Carrier: TransEuro Logistics GmbH

documents.title: Transit Contract TC-2024-DE-UK-001 (CIF)
documents.body:
TRANSIT CONTRACT TC-2024-DE-UK-001
Seller: DE_SUB | Buyer: UK_SUB
Date: 2024-02-15

SHIPPING TERMS: Incoterm: CIF (Cost, Insurance, and Freight)
Port of Loading: Hamburg | Port of Destination: London

Per CIF terms, seller (DE_SUB) bears risk until goods arrive at destination port.
Seller has arranged marine cargo insurance Policy: MCI-2024-0215.

documents.title: Shipment Report SR-2024-US-DE-002
documents.body:
SHIPMENT REPORT
Shipment ID: SR-2024-US-DE-002
Origin: US_PARENT (New York warehouse)
Destination: DE_SUB (Frankfurt warehouse)
Date Shipped: 2024-03-05
Date Arrived: Never (lost at sea)
Contents: Electronics and semiconductors (200 units)
Declared Value: USD 35,000.00

INCIDENT REPORT: Container lost overboard during Atlantic crossing in rough weather.
Loss confirmed by carrier Maritime Express Inc.
The goods never arrived at the destination.

documents.title: Transit Contract TC-2024-US-DE-002 (FOB)
documents.body:
TRANSIT CONTRACT TC-2024-US-DE-002
Seller: US_PARENT | Buyer: DE_SUB
Date: 2024-02-28

SHIPPING TERMS: Incoterm: FOB (Free On Board)
Port of Loading: New York
Port of Destination: Bremen

Per FOB terms, risk transfers to the buyer (DE_SUB) once goods are loaded onto the vessel at the port of loading. Buyer is responsible for arranging freight insurance from point of loading.

documents.title: Shipment Report SR-2024-UK-US-003
documents.body:
SHIPMENT REPORT
Shipment ID: SR-2024-UK-US-003
Origin: UK_SUB (Manchester plant)
Destination: US_PARENT (Chicago warehouse)
Date Shipped: 2024-03-10
Date Arrived: 2024-03-22
Contents: Pharmaceutical active ingredients (batch B-2024-0310)
Declared Value: GBP 28,000.00

REJECTION REPORT: Shipment rejected at customs. Temperature excursion detected during transit
(temperature exceeded 8°C for 6 hours, spoiling temperature-sensitive cargo).
Goods deemed unusable and returned to sender at buyer's customs facility.

documents.title: Transit Contract TC-2024-UK-US-003 (CIF)
documents.body:
TRANSIT CONTRACT TC-2024-UK-US-003
Seller: UK_SUB | Buyer: US_PARENT
Date: 2024-03-01

SHIPPING TERMS: Incoterm: CIF (Cost, Insurance, and Freight)
Port of Loading: Liverpool
Port of Destination: New York

Per CIF terms, seller (UK_SUB) bears risk and arranges insurance until goods arrive at destination port.
Temperature-controlled shipping required for pharmaceutical cargo. Seller responsible for cold chain compliance.

legal_truth.rationale: Primary dispute (DOC-H-002): CIF — DE_SUB (seller) is liable. Secondary dispute (DOC-H-005): FOB — DE_SUB (buyer) is liable once loaded. Tertiary dispute (DOC-H-008): CIF — UK_SUB (seller) is liable.
